description: Checklist for reward accrual, checkpoint synchronization, and claim correctness review.
core_invariants: users should not receive more rewards than their effective accrual share
reward baseline updates must stay aligned with balance checkpoints
global emitted rewards and user-distributed rewards should remain reconcilable
check_items: check whether reward debt is synchronized before balance mutation
compare deposit, withdraw, and claim paths for ordering differences
verify whether zero-amount or partial-withdraw paths skip checkpoint updates
check whether reward token transfer happens before internal accounting finalization
verify that emergency or admin paths do not bypass accrual synchronization
test_ideas: user deposits then partially withdraws before claim
two users stake at different times and compare fair reward distribution
zero-amount claim or withdraw edge case
reward token with callback-like behavior or failing transfer path
